title: JIADEXIN Blind Spot Mirrors - Round Frameless 360° Rotate Sway Adjustable HD Glass Convex Mirror Maximize RearView Universal for Car SUV Trucks Traffic Security to Eliminate Blind Spots - Pack of 2
features: 【360° Rotate】Designed to increase visibility and improve driving safety. Newest upgrade 360° rotate with 30° sway adjustable grants complete all round vision and eliminates the blind spot.
【Premium Material】Quality material has excellent reflection properties and does not scratch easily, waterproof, sturdy and durable, won't haze or distort, what's more, it's real HD.
【Round Frameless】Unique ultra-thin, frameless and convex Mirror design will not bother you while driving at the same time effectively expand your visual angle.
【Easy to Install】Please clean your original car side mirrors, then stick blind spot mirrors to the mounting bracket and install them on side rear view mirrors.
【Universal Fit】Compatible with all types of cars. Every Car Truck, SUV, UTV, ATV, RVs and Vans are Suitable and Necessary.
description: Product Description 360 Degree 2 pieces packaged, newest upgrade 360 degree rotate and sway adjustable, maximize your view with wide angle in car. All convex spot mirrors are equipped with tiny adjustable swivel mounting bracket for easy installation. HD Glass Our HD Glass Curved Blindspot Mirrors is frameless and has a slim design, waterproof, rust resistant, Convex ultra thin HD glass, no haze rear view side mirror. 360° Rotate Frameless Design HD Glass Angle Adjustable More Safety Convex mirrors increase safety by eliminating blind spots for safer driving when passing and changing lanes on any road. Compatible with all types of cars. Every Car Truck, SUV, UTV, ATV, RVs and Vans are Suitable and Necessary. Easy to Install 1. Wipe the mirrors clean 2. Remove two turns of double sided tape 3. Glue the large loop tape to the back of the mirror 4. Then glue the mirror to the 360° bracket 5. Glue the small round tape to the bottom of the bracket 6. Installation is complete
